charter: Make dispatch deadline and productive timeout retry deadline respect per_turn_minutes config (default 120min) instead of hardcoded 20min/60min values
acceptance_contract: governed-state.js reads per_turn_minutes from config for deadline_at falling back to 120
continuous-run.js reads per_turn_minutes for productive timeout retry deadline falling back to 120
Framework templates include timeouts.per_turn_minutes: 120 by default
